history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hi! I see you're ordering for three people: a child aged 6, a child aged 12, and one other. For the 6-year-old, we have Our World Famous Fries® available. Would you like that?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Hi, I'm ordering for three people: me, my six-year-old, and my twelve-year-old. What do you recommend?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: For your 6-year-old, we have McSpicy Paneer®, Pizza McPuff®, and Veg Maharaja Mac® available. Which one would you like for them?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Okay, I'll take the Veg Maharaja Mac® for my six-year-old. What do you recommend for my twelve-year-old and me?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it! For your 12-year-old, we have Veg Maharaja Mac®, Chicken Maharaja Mac®, or McVeggie® available. What would you like for them? And what would you prefer for yourself?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'll take the Chicken Maharaja Mac for my twelve-year-old and a Big Mac for me.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Okay, I have the Chicken Maharaja Mac® for your twelve-year-old. But we don't have Big Mac on the menu today. For yourself, we have Chicken Maharaja Mac® or Veg Maharaja Mac®. Which one would you like?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'll take the Veg Maharaja Mac for me.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is: Veg Maharaja Mac® for your six-year-old, Chicken Maharaja Mac® for your twelve-year-old, and Veg Maharaja Mac® for you. Please confirm this order.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's the order for me and my kids. Thanks!

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed: 1 Veg Maharaja Mac® for your six-year-old, 1 Chicken Maharaja Mac® for your twelve-year-old, and 1 Veg Maharaja Mac® for you. Thank you! Have a great day.

query_texts: popular menu items burger chicken fries

documents: Our World Famous Fries®. The crisp, craveable, fan favourite: our World Famous Fries®. These epic fries are crispy and golden on the outside and fluffy on the inside.. Potato and salt. The legend among legends.

rag_trace.context_preview: - Our World Famous Fries® (~224.6–449.2 kcal, allergens: none listed)

documents: McSpicy Paneer®. Crispy and spicy paneer patty with creamy tandoori sauce and crispy lettuce topping.. Quarter pounder bun crown, Shredded lettuce, Tandoori mayo, Spicy paneer patty, Quarter pounder bun heel. Let paneer surprise you.

Pizza McPuff®. A blend of assorted vegetables (carrot, beans,capsicum, onion & green peas); mozzarella cheese mixed with tomato sauce; and exotic spices stuffed in rectangle shaped savoury dough. Quick frozen.. Assorted vegetables, Refined wheat flour, Pizza seasoning. Something different. Something delicious.

Veg Maharaja Mac®. A double-decker toasted Maharaja bun sandwiched with one layer of corn & cheese patty; crunchy iceberg lettuce; shredded onion; and a slice of cheese. Topped with another layer of corn & cheese patty;
                                tomato slices; and crunchy iceberg lettuce infused with harberno sauce.. Maharaja bun crown, Cocktail sauce, Shredded lettuce, Shredded onion, Jalepenos, Corn & cheese patty, club, Sliced cheese, Maharaja bun heel. A feast fit for kings (and queens).
